title.en: Ye Tian felt that if he killed these Emperor Li...

content.en:
Ye Tian felt that if he killed these Emperor List powerhouses and those ancient demon-level existences, he would inevitably get extremely high battle points, and it might be enough to gather 10 million battle points!

Rumble!!!!!

These three top Emperor List powerhouses and the six Ancient Demon-level powerhouses didn't have the slightest nonsense, and after coming here, they directly made a move against Ye Tian.

In their opinion, after killing Ye Tian in an instant, he immediately ran away, even if Ye Tian had reinforcements, he would not be able to leave them.

However, Ye Tian exploded into the second form of the True Lin Form in an instant, and manifested the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Its terrifying strength shocked these ancient demon-level powerhouses and the top emperor list powerhouses.

"What, Ultimate Rule Realm !!!"

They never expected that Ye Tian would actually comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm!!!

You must know that if an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse comprehends the Ultimate Rule Realm, he can break through to a top-level Ancient Demon-level existence!

These ancient demon levels have not comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm, and they have not even comprehended the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

But even Ye Tian, an emperor-level powerhouse 09, had realized the ultimate rule realm, which simply broke their cognition.

Moreover, Ye Tian had also cultivated the True Lin Form to the second form, and the life pattern was also extremely powerful, and his physical body was terrifying, no less than the heirs of those peak Ancient Demon Level Existences or even the Descendants of the Ultimate Ancient Demon Level Existence.

Not only that, what Ye Tian had cast was the top-notch ultimate arcane, and the power that burst out was terrifying!

Burst!!!!!

A top emperor powerhouse was cut open by Ye Tian's Arrow Mother's blade, the ultimate particles on his body were shattered, and the ultimate will turned into nothingness, and he was actually killed in an instant.

Several other powerhouses wanted to escape, but the continuous contraction of the Ultimate Rule Realm suppressed them, making them unable to escape in time, and could only desperately attack Ye Tian.

But after most of their attacks were neutralized by the Ultimate Rule Realm, the remaining attacks couldn't break Ye Tian's Arrow Mu Armor at all.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian once again cast the blade of the Arrow, killing a top Emperor List powerhouse again, and then killing the third Emperor List powerhouse.

This third Emperor List powerhouse was very frightened and wanted to block this blow, but no matter what, he couldn't block Ye Tian's attack.

Burst!!!

Many defenses were shattered by a single blow, the body was pierced, and all the ultimate particles on the body were annihilated, and they were still killed by one blow.

This is the difference in strength! No amount of life-saving things can save lives.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the remaining six ancient demon-level powerhouses were killed, these six ancient demon-level powerhouses were not too powerful, but they were much more difficult to kill than the emperor list powerhouses.

After all, the ultimate particles of the Ancient Demon-level lifeforms are more tenacious, and the life is too powerful to be easily killed.

But they were in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and their strength was suppressed, so they couldn't compete with Ye Tian.

Coupled with Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm suppression, they couldn't escape either.

Soon, one after another Ancient Demon-level powerhouses fell.

However, the last Ancient Demon-level powerhouse used a special treasure to break through Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm and escaped.

"He actually escaped, it should be a treasure of a peak ancient demon-level existence, which can break through my ultimate rule realm, but he should have paid a great price!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't care about escaping an ancient demon-level powerhouse, anyway, it was impossible for him to hide the news of killing these ancient demon-level powerhouses and the emperor list powerhouse.

So, if the other party escapes, just run away!

Immediately, he began to check his record points.

"So many !! records"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

More than 8.7 million battle points!

A battlefield, with so much to gain, really made him extremely excited.

However, when I thought that there were several top Emperor List powerhouses, and there were five Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, killing the Ancient Demon-level powerhouses would reward extremely high performance points in itself.

So, these record points are normal.

......

Dom Fortress.

The escaped Ancient Demon-level powerhouse quickly returned, and he came to see the Doha Ancient Demon for the first time.

"Miluo Ancient Demon, you are seriously injured, and you are the only one who has returned, what's the matter?"

Miluo Ancient Demon lowered his head and said: "Lord Doha Ancient Demon, we have failed, the Emperor List powerhouse of the Aromu Fortress is too demonic, and he definitely has the strength of the first Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress, the three top Emperor List powerhouses and the other five Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were all killed by him, if I didn't escape with the help of a treasure, otherwise I would have been killed!"

"How is this possible?"

The Doha Ancients didn't believe it.

However, he took a look at the Emperor List, and the three Emperor List powerhouses had already been reported from the top of the Dom Fortress Emperor List, and the other five Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were also uncontactable.

This is the case, and it is not possible to believe it.

"Why does Heaven have such strength?"

Doha Ancient Demon asked.

"Tian has the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and he has cultivated a form secret method to the second form, the life pattern is extremely powerful, the physical body is terrifying, and he also has the top ultimate arcane ......"

The Miluo Ancient Demon hadn't finished speaking, but the Doha Ancient Demon didn't want to continue listening.

The strength of this statement is too demonic, he has never seen it, and he doesn't even want to believe it.

"Go down!"

703 Doha Ancient Demon shouted.

The Miluo Ancient Demon retreated, and he did not complete the task, and he could not ask the Doha Ancient Demon for benefits.

In short, this mission is too bad!

After that, the Doha Ancient Demon began to inquire about Ye Tian's situation, and soon learned that Ye Tian's ranking on the Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress had risen directly to the second place.

Second on the emperor's list!

This is enough to prove Ye Tian's strength!

"Damn, second on the Emperor List, if I don't make a move, just an ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse will make a move, and I won't be able to kill him in the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield at all!"

Doha Ancient Demon Secret Road.

Unless the first place in Dom Fortress and the ordinary ancient demon level of Dom Fortress comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm and are also the powerhouses of the Emperor List at the beginning, then there is hope to kill Ye Tian and make Ye Tian unable to leave alive.

However, he couldn't mobilize those strong people, and the status of those strong people was even no less than him, and he also had the ultimate rule backing behind him.

"Damn it!"

The Doha Demons were furious.

......

Aromu Fortress.

Ye Tian's ranking on the Emperor List suddenly rose to the second place on the Emperor List, shocking everyone in the Arrow Mu Fortress, and they couldn't believe it.

Because they knew very well what the second place on the emperor list represented, but Ye Tian made it to the second place on the emperor list.

All of a sudden, Ye Tian's reputation really resounded through the Arrow Mu Fortress! .
